description: You are a Data Engineer at a marketing analytics firm. A legacy Python data cleaning pipeline (gdpr_cleaner) at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/gdpr_cleaner processes raw customer signups to remove PII. The current implementation is buggy and non-compliant: hashing is non-deterministic, valid data is being dropped, IP masking is incorrect, and date parsing crashes on mixed formats. Fix the logic in cleaner/processors.py and cleaner/utils.py to ensure all tests in the suite pass. Once the pipeline is corrected, generate the final cleaned dataset at data/clean_signups.csv.
